topic: Switzerland 4-1 Bosnia: Johan Manzambi's brace announces a new star in Group B

youtube_title: Switzerland 4-1 Bosnia: 20-Year-Old Manzambi Scores TWICE in 16 Minutes | World Cup 2026
youtube_description:
A 20-year-old substitute just announced himself at the World Cup.

Johan Manzambi came off the bench and scored twice as Switzerland crushed Bosnia 4-1 in Los Angeles. Vargas and Xhaka added the rest as the Swiss took control of Group B.

#WorldCup2026 #Switzerland #Bosnia #Manzambi #FIFAWorldCup #TikiTakaFootyTV
